response.justification: While the candidate brings 15+ years of engineering experience and recent engagement with agentic systems, the resume lacks critical CTO requirements: no demonstrated track record of leading and scaling engineering teams to 30+ people, no production multi-agent AI systems experience (recent work is infrastructure-focused and only 4 months old), no fintech infrastructure background, and no operating experience in regulated financial environments. This is a strong senior IC engineer but lacks the executive leadership foundation and domain expertise required.
strengths: 15+ years diverse software engineering across web, mobile, and systems with hands-on depth in multiple domains
Proven backend systems expertise from Dunnhumby (microservices handling millions of RPS, low-latency design with async I/O and high-performance databases)
Current AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq demonstrate current engagement with agentic frameworks and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated engineering team leadership or scaling track record—career shows individual contributor roles only, not building or leading teams toward the 10-30+ person scale required
No production multi-agent AI systems or ML evaluation pipeline experience; AI work is recent (4 months) and appears infrastructure-focused rather than domain leadership
No fintech, credit systems, payment flows, or regulated financial environment background—missing both domain expertise and compliance/audit experience critical for the role

key_factors.factor: Engineering team leadership and scaling experience
Fintech infrastructure and regulated environment expertise
